rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §29.0162 governs representation in special education due process hearings. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter and share no operative dependency.
quote: A person in an impartial due process hearing brought under 20 U.S.C. Section 1415 may be represented by:
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
